subject: 📢 Important Notice: SLFRC Constitution Meeting
body:
Quick Brief

This circular serves as an official invitation to all parents for an upcoming meeting to constitute the School Level Fee Regulation Committee (SLFRC) at Vidya Jain Convent School. Held in strict compliance with the directives of the Directorate of Education (Government of NCT of Delhi) and the Delhi School Education Act & Rules, 2025, this meeting is a crucial step toward ensuring transparent fee fixation and regulation.

Active parental participation is highly appreciated and requested to ensure collaborative governance.

Key Details at a Glance

* Purpose: Constitution of the School Level Fee Regulation Committee (SLFRC)
* Date: Monday, 13 July 2026
* Time: 1:00 PM
* Venue: Vidya Jain Convent School, Kanjhawala, Delhi

subject: PTA Election - 15th January at 10:00 a.m.
body: Dear Parents, This is to inform you that the PTA (Parent-Teacher Association) Election will be held on Thursday, 15th January at 10:00 a.m. in the school premises. All parents are requested to kindly visit the school at the above-mentioned date and time to participate in the election process. Your presence and cooperation are important for the smooth functioning of the PTA and the school. VJ CONVENT We look forward to your valuable participation. Thanking you. Warm regards, Principal Vidya Jain Convent School.

subject: Urgent Postponement of PTA Meeting Scheduled on 08/01/2026
body:
This is to inform you that the PTA meeting scheduled for 13/01/2026 has been postponed due to urgent and unforeseen circumstances.
The same has also been updated and mentioned on the school website. The new date for the meeting will be communicated shortly. Parents have already been informed regarding the same.
School Name: Vidya Jain Convent School, Kanjawala
School ID: 1413347
Kindly acknowledge the receipt of this message.
Regards,
Vidya Jain Convent School
Kanjawala
